client_id.description: The ID of the Connected App client.

client_name.description: A human-readable name for the client.

client_description.description: A human-readable description for the client.

full_access_allowed.description: Valid for first party clients only. If `true`, an authorization token granted to this Client can be exchanged for a full Stytch session.

client_type.description: The type of Connected App. Supported values are `first_party`, `first_party_public`, `third_party`, and `third_party_public`.

redirect_urls.description: Array of redirect URI values for use in OAuth Authorization flows.

post_logout_redirect_urls.description: Array of redirect URI values for use in OIDC Logout flows.

bypass_consent_for_offline_access.description: Valid for first party clients only. If true, the client does not need to request explicit user consent for the `offline_access` scope.

client_secret_last_four.description: The last four characters of the client secret.

next_client_secret_last_four.description: The last four characters of the `next_client_secret`. Null if no `next_client_secret` exists.

logo_url.description: The logo URL of the Connected App, if any.
